memoryArtifacts.headline: The Garretts -- Before America
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Garretts — Before America
by John E. Garrett
Last year, I published my work entitled, "1000 Years of Garrett Family History". The emphasis in that effort
was the genealogy of the Garretts since their immigration to America in the mid-seventeenth century. This
work examines how the Garretts evolved during the generations that they spent in England, Wales and
Ireland from the time the first ancestor landed in England until the first Garrett came to America.
My research involved the use of:
 A commercial genealogy website named Ancestry.com.
 Extensive use of the Google search engine on the Internet
The first 100 years, starting in the eleventh century, was the most interesting. That was where I found a
remarkable relationship between my ancestors and King Edward the Confessor, King William the Conqueror
and King Henry I. My first ancestor to land in England, Otho Geraldini, grew-up with Edward before he
became King; his son Walter FitzOtho was in William, the Bastard's army; and his son Gerald grew-up with
Prince Henry (King William"s son) who became King Henry I. Their close relationship is demonstrated by the
vast amount of land, castles and titles bestowed upon them.
In retrospect, I am impressed at how important the genes of the spouses are to the family's genealogy. The
best example of this is when my ancestor, Gerald of Windsor married Nesta Rhys, a Welsh Princess. There
offsprings were all outstanding. The next "high" came when the Garrett's became merchants in the 16th
century, opened trade with Russia, became Lord Mayor of London and honorary knighthood.
To make this work more readable, I have placed several interesting "asides" in the Appendix. For example,
the de Clares, of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare fame married into the Garretts. I found extensive genealogy
on the ancestry of Richard "Strongbow" de Clare going back before 100 AD. So, I put his data into two
appendices. One for the French ancestors and another for the Viking ancestors.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini於大約0990年出生在義大利托斯卡納費倫費倫時，他的父親Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini57歲，母親Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini37歲。他於1005年與Sancia de la Cerda在義大利托斯卡納費倫費倫結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1075年在法國諾門迪享年87歲，埋葬在義大利托斯卡納費倫費倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini于大约0990年出生在意大利托斯卡納費倫費倫时，他的父亲Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini57岁，母亲Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini37岁。他于1005年与Sancia de la Cerda在意大利托斯卡納費倫費倫结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1075年在法国諾門迪享年87岁，埋葬在意大利托斯卡納費倫費倫。

nameMeanings.name: Gherardo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Silvio, Alessandro, Angelo, Antonio, Donato, Egidio, Ennio, Enzo, Gildo, Lucio, Luigi, Primo.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Gherardo, one of themany Italian equivalents of Gerard .

variants.name: Gerard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Jean-Pierre, Murielle, Emile, Pascal, Pierre, Agathe, Alain, Aldes, Antoine, Armand.

French (Gérard), Walloon (mainly Gérard), and English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Gérard, Gerard (from Old French Gerart, Girart), composed of the ancient Germanic elements gēr ‘spear, lance’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. As a surname of French origin it is also found in Haiti. Compare Garrard and also French Guerard , English Garard , Gerrard , and Jarrard .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini was born about 0990, in Florence, Florence, Tuscany, Italy, his father, Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, was 57 and his mother, Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, was 37. He married Sancia de la Cerda in 1005, in Florence, Florence, Tuscany, Italy. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died about 1075, in Normandy, France, at the age of 87, and was buried in Florence, Florence, Tuscany, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini est né environ 0990, à Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italie, son père, Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Sancia de la Cerda en 1005, à Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé environ 1075, à Normandie, France, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini um 0990 in Florenz, Firenze, Toscana, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini 57 und seine Mutter Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini 37. Er hat 1005 in Florenz, Firenze, Toscana, Italien Sancia de la Cerda geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb um 1075 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Florenz, Firenze, Toscana, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini è nato il circa 0990 nel Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia, il suo padre, Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Sancia de la Cerda nel 1005, nel Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì circa 1075, nel Normandie, Francia, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardiniが約0990年にイタリアトスカナフィアーエンズフィアーエンズで生まれた時，父Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardiniは57歳，母Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardiniは37歳であった。1005年にイタリアトスカナフィアーエンズフィアーエンズでSancia de la Cerdaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は約1075年にフランスノーマンディで87歳で死去し，イタリアトスカナフィアーエンズフィアーエンズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini(이)가 대략 0990년 이탈리아 토스캔아 피렌즈 피렌즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1005년 이탈리아 토스캔아 피렌즈 피렌즈에서 Sancia de la Cerda(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1075년 프랑스 노먼디에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 토스캔아 피렌즈 피렌즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Itália, seu pai, Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Sancia de la Cerda em 1005, em Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1075, em Normandie, França, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini родился около 0990 г. в местности фиренз, фиренз, тоскана, Италия, его отцу по имени Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Sancia de la Cerda в 1005 г. в местности фиренз, фиренз, тоскана, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер около 1075 г. в местности норманди, Франция в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности фиренз, фиренз, тоскана, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Otterus Gherardo Gherardini nació aproximadamente 0990, en Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia, su papá, Lord Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, tenía 57 años y su mamá, Mrs. Otterus Othoer di Gherardini, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sancia de la Cerda en 1005, en Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1075, en Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Firenze, Firenze, Toscana, Italia.
